name: zendesk
description: Typed stream/read/write surface for the official Zendesk Support API; binary lanes remain gated and all mutations use reverse-ETL approval flow.

risk.read: bounded ETL streams are enabled for 70 top-level collection reads and bounded direct-read JSON commands remain enabled for typed GET operations; binary downloads are still gated by later Zendesk lanes
risk.write: 295 non-deprecated Zendesk mutating operations are modeled as typed reverse-ETL actions; destructive DELETE actions require typed confirmation and all writes require plan, preview, approval, execute
risk.approval: all external writes require plan → preview → approval → execute; destructive actions also require typed confirmation
